thesis_profile.market_mechanism: v80 minimal-6 alpha core (4 Tier-1 stable-sign IC features + 2 regime-conditional momentum features) augmented with v74-style screening penalties on 5 quality-filter features (range_position, distance_to_low, return_1, quote_volume_expansion, ema_slope_5_20); penalty terms target chase, distress, broken_tape, distress_floor, upper_extension setups that v80 lacked, restoring the regime-holdout robustness while preserving v80's stronger rank IC and lower test loss
thesis_profile.directional_claim: rank top-20 liquid perp-covered names by v80's 6-feature linear alpha core minus v74-style screening penalties at moderate weights; expected to restore 3/3 regime POS profile while keeping v80's superior rank IC (0.16) and improved test sharpe (-0.32)
thesis_profile.factor_formula: alpha_score = -0.30*z(realized_vol) -0.20*z(intraday_vol) +0.20*z(distance_to_high) -0.15*z(top_trader_long) + sign_regime*(0.15*z(relative_strength) + 0.10*z(momentum_20)). Penalties: chase=0.42*max(0, qv_exp-1.12) + 5.51*max(0, return_1∈[0,0.04]); distress=1.20*(-rs∈[0.05,0.40]) + 0.80*(-ema_slope∈[0.02,0.08]); broken_tape=1.20*max(0,-dist_to_low-0.005) + 0.80*(-return_1∈[0.04,0.12]); distress_floor=8.0*max(0,0.10-range_pos); upper_extension=4.5*max(0,range_pos-0.78). raw_score = alpha_score - 0.05*chase - 0.05*distress - 0.04*broken_tape - 0.05*distress_floor - 0.045*upper_extension. Final = tanh((pct_rank(raw_score)-0.5)*1.80).
